creator: sbahra@gwu.edu
text:
I wasn't aware the GTK build was broken. This patch is fine with me,
good to see thunderbird has finally released an update. :D

Regards.

On Sun, Aug 24, 2008 at 10:10 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/nvclock,
>
> Please note that PR ports/126786 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/126786
